title: Geas Task State
description: Task-scoped runtime state. Holds the lifecycle status, which agent is currently executing this task, and how many verify-fix iterations have been consumed. The task contract holds intent and approval; runtime state lives here.

status.description: Current lifecycle status for the task. Transitions are guarded by the CLI; see protocol doc 03 for the state machine.

active_agent.description: Agent currently executing on this task. Concrete agent type — matches the 'agent' field of evidence files. For authority slots this equals the slot name (decision-maker, etc.); for specialist slots this is the domain profile's concrete type (e.g. software-engineer). Null when no agent is active. If the agent holds multiple slots in this task, which slot is in progress is reflected in which evidence/{agent}.{slot}.json is being appended, not in this field.

verify_fix_iterations.description: Number of verify-fix iterations already consumed on this task.
